summary: Comprehensive testing of backend refactoring (server.py split into 29 modular routes) and 4 new feature modules (Aromatherapy, Herbology, Elixirs, Meals). All 28 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 new frontend pages working correctly with proper navigation.
seed_data_creation: Test meal logs created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete - server.py split into 29 modular route files. All existing endpoints continue working. 4 new feature modules (Aromatherapy, Herbology, Elixirs, Meals) fully functional.

GET /api/aromatherapy/oils.structure: id, name, latin, color, properties, chakra, element, uses, spiritual, caution

GET /api/aromatherapy/oil/lavender.returns: Full oil detail with uses, emotional, spiritual, caution

frontend_page.detail_panel: Working - shows chakra, element, uses, emotional, spiritual, caution

GET /api/herbology/herbs.structure: id, name, latin, family, properties, systems, preparations, dosage, caution

GET /api/herbology/herb/ashwagandha.returns: Full herb detail with traditional_use, dosage, spiritual

frontend_page.search_functionality: Working - filters by name, properties, body systems
frontend_page.detail_panel: Working - shows taste, energy, parts, traditional use, systems, preparations, dosage, spiritual, caution

GET /api/elixirs/golden_milk.returns: Full elixir detail with ingredients, instructions, tradition, intention, benefits

frontend_page.category_filter: Working - All, Healing Lattes, Medicinal Teas, Tonics & Shots, Healing Smoothies, Ceremonial Drinks
frontend_page.detail_panel: Working - shows ingredients, instructions, tradition, intention, benefits

GET /api/meals/log (authenticated).returns: User's meal logs sorted by created_at desc

frontend_page.plan_detail: Working - shows breakfast, lunch, snack, dinner with items and intentions
frontend_page.food_journal_unauthenticated: Shows 'Sign in to log your meals' prompt
frontend_page.food_journal_authenticated: Working - meal logger form with type, items, gratitude, notes, mindful checkbox
frontend_page.meal_logging: Working - logs meal and displays in Recent Meals list
